name: Andrew
cooked: Looks like a batch of the Stem Players is up for sale here. Seems like a pretty fair price too. Fair warning, I have not purchased it myself and have no plans to since I wouldn’t have a use for the item except to try and hack it.

Fair warning, I have not purchased it myself and have no plans to since I wouldn't have a use for the item except to try and hack it.
